nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: 所羅門群島 (群島)
nodes.summary: 所羅門群島 (群島)是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联21种鸟类，包括Melanesian megapode、Crested cuckoo-dove、Yellow-legged pigeon等21种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: Brown-winged starling
nodes.summary: Brown-winged starling（Aplonis grandis）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Brown-winged starling。

nodes.name: 动物界

nodes.name: Brown-winged starling
nodes.summary: The brown-winged starling (Aplonis grandis) is a species of starling in the family Sturnidae. It is found in the Solomon Islands archipelago. Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical moist lowland forests. References
nodes.shortSummary: The brown-winged starling (Aplonis grandis) is a species of starling in the family Sturnidae. It is found in the Solomon Islands archipelag…
